narrative:
Delaware Township has 1,377 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.7 percentage points.
